py_file_analyzer.description: Analyze all Python files in a directory: count lines, functions, and classes per file using AST parsing.

tech_graph.description: Generate production-quality SVG + PNG technical diagrams. Supports 14 diagram types (architecture, data-flow, flowchart, sequence, agent, memory, use-case, class, state-machine, er-diagram, network-topology, comparison, timeline, mind-map) and 7 visual styles.

json_structure_analyzer.description: Analyze a JSON file and produce a structured summary report: total count of top-level keys, each key's value type (str, int, float, bool, null, object, array), for nested objects: number of sub-keys and their names, for arrays: length and element type distribution, for arrays of objects: schema hint from first element's keys. Input: file_path (str). Output: prints formatted report and returns a dict with analysis results.

json_codebase_schema_auditor.description: Audits all JSON files in a codebase directory by analyzing their structure, key types, nested schemas, and cross-file consistency in a single workflow.
